title: Welcome to the 2025/2026 Academic Session
content: The Computer Science Department welcomes all returning and newly admitted students to the 2025/2026 session. Course registration opens on the student portal — check your department notice board for the exact deadline this semester.

title: SIWES Orientation for ND II Students
content: All ND II Computer Science students proceeding to SIWES (Student Industrial Work Experience Scheme) should attend the orientation session at the department. Bring your ND II result slip and a valid means of identification.

title: HND I Course Registration Deadline Approaching
content: HND I Computer Science students are reminded to complete course registration on the student portal before the deadline. Late registration may attract a penalty fee — see the Bursary for details.

title: Department Seminar: Introduction to Cloud Computing
content: The department is hosting a seminar on cloud computing fundamentals, open to all Computer Science and Computer Engineering students. Attendance counts toward continuous assessment for CSC-related courses this semester.

title: Examination Timetable Released
content: The semester examination timetable has been released. Check the student portal for your specific exam dates, venues, and seating arrangements.

title: Lecturers: Continuous Assessment Score Submission
content: All lecturers are reminded to submit continuous assessment scores through the staff portal before the end of the semester examination period.
